data.title: U.S. House Passes CLARITY Act to Regulate Digital Asset Market
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. House of Representatives has approved the CLARITY Act, aimed at regulating the structure of the digital asset market. This legislative move seeks to establish clearer guidelines and oversight for digital assets, addressing the growing need for a structured framework in this rapidly evolving sector.

data.title: Remittix Quietly Raises $16.5M While Litecoin (LTC) and Binance Coin (BNB) Investors Start Rotating
data.description:
While major tokens like Litecoin and Binance Coin move sideways, a quiet disruptor is catching fire. Remittix (RTX), a crypto-to-fiat payment solution, has now raised $16. 5 million and is inching toward its $18M softcap. As investors seek real-world utility over hype, many are rotating into projects like RTX that offer instant, borderless payments, without the. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/remittix-quietly-raises-16-5m-while-litecoin-ltc-and-binance-coin-bnb-investors-start-rotating/

data.title: Japan’s bond market under pressure as election triggers investor nerves
data.description:
The bond market in Japan is cracking under pressure, and all fingers are pointing to one thing: the upcoming Upper House election on July 20. What should be just another political shuffle is now looking like a trigger for a financial shake-up, both inside the country and far beyond. With government bond yields already hovering […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japans-bond-market-under-pressure/

data.title: White House Supports Easier Cryptocurrency Payments
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the White House Press Secretary announced that the administration is committed to making cryptocurrency payments more accessible. The Secretary expressed confidence that there are sufficient votes to pass the 'Genius Act.' It is anticipated that more cryptocurrency-related legislation will be introduced in the future.

data.title: Trump to Sign Crypto Legislation at Upcoming Event
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump is set to sign several cryptocurrency-related bills, including the Genius Act, during an event on Friday, as announced by the White House Press Secretary.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 720 USDT with a 1.54% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 17, 2025, 18:29 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 720 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 720.080017 USDT, with a narrowed 1.54% increase in 24 hours.
